name: data-table
description: Full-featured data table with sorting, pagination, search, column visibility, CSV export, and bulk actions
author: AD AI Engine
instructions:
1. Import DataTable and pass your columns and data
2. DataTable integrates SearchFilter, ColumnToggle, ExportCSV, and BulkActions automatically
3. Define columns with { key, label, sortable?, render? }
4. Provide onBulkDelete callback for bulk delete functionality
